heroNoSignals: Perception signals will appear here as soon as enough responses are available.
heroStrongestNeedsWork: {{strongest}} lifts the score, while {{weakest}} remains the axis to strengthen.
heroBestAxisSummary: {{label}} is currently the best understood axis.
editorPageBaseline: Edit the brand profile: positioning, use cases, features, and competitors.
editableFieldsDescription: Saved changes are reused across the brand and perception views.
fieldBrandHint: Name shown in AI responses and summary views.
fieldCategoryHint: Primary sector or category used to position the brand.
fieldShortDescriptionHint: Short summary automatically derived from the full description. It is not edited separately on this screen yet.
fieldPositioningHint: Reference description that clearly explains what the brand does.
fieldUseCasesDescription: Use cases that should stand out in AI responses.
fieldFeaturesDescription: Features the brand should be recognized for immediately.
footerDefaultMessage: Saving the brand reference and competitors.
competitorsDescription: Add or update competitors used in comparisons and AI analyses.
validationMissingCompetitorName: Each competitor must have a name or be removed.
